heading: Unlawful advertisements on medium of electronic communication
label: 1335 Unlawful advertisements on medium of electronic communication
text: After , it shall be unlawful to advertise cigarettes and little cigars on any medium of electronic communication subject to the jurisdiction of the Federal Communications Commission.January 1, 1971
notes: Amendments1973— extended prohibition against advertisements to little cigars.Pub. L. 93–1091970— substituted provision that after , it shall be unlawful to advertise cigarettes on any medium of electronic communication subject to the jurisdiction of the Federal Communications Commission, for provision that a violation of this chapter should constitute misdemeanor and be punishable by fine. See, now, .Pub. L. 91–222section 1338 of this titleJanuary 1, 1971
Effective Date of 1973 AmendmentAmendment by effective thirty days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 93–109section 4 of Pub. L. 93–109section 1332 of this titleSept. 21, 1973

Effective Date of 1970 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except where otherwise specified, see , set out in part as a note under .Pub. L. 91–222section 3 of Pub. L. 91–222section 1331 of this titleJan. 1, 1970
